title.text: Google Analytics, Siteimprove and Facebook Pixel

body:0001.text: What are tracking integrations and which do we support?

body:0002.text: You can integrate your platform with external analytics tools such as Google Analytics (UA and GA4), Facebook Pixel, or Siteimprove by submitting the correct tracking code.

body:0005.text: Connect your platform with external dashboards

body:0008.text: Google Analytics (UA or GA4 Tracking ID)

body:0012.text: How to add Google Analytics to your platform?

body:0013.text: Locate your Google Tracking ID (either UA-code or GA4-code).

body:0014.text: Send it to us at via the chat bubble

body:0015.text: We’ll implement the code on your platform and confirm once active.

body:0016.text: You can also send us a Google Tag Manager HTML snippet if you prefer managing tags through GTM.

body:0017.text: Need help? Where to find your Google Tracking ID

body:0018.text: How to add siteimprove to your platform?

body:0019.text: Get your Siteimprove HTML tag from your Siteimprove admin.

body:0020.text: Email the full HTML tag to support via the chat bubble

body:0021.text: We’ll embed it on your platform and confirm setup.

body:0022.text: How to add facebook pixel to your platform?

body:0023.text: Go to Events Manager in your Facebook Business account.

body:0024.text: Select your pixel, then click Set Up > Install Pixel.

body:0025.text: Choose Manually add pixel code to website.

body:0026.text: Copy the entire main Pixel code.

body:0027.text: Send the full HTML code to support via the chat bubble.

body:0028.text: Once installed, Facebook will begin tracking events on your platform.

body:0029.text: Learn more: Where to find your Facebook Pixel code

body:0030.text: Who installs the tracking codes for your platform?

body:0031.text: Our team handles the integration of all tracking codes for you.

body:0034.text: A custom HTML snippet (for Siteimprove, GTM, Facebook Pixel, etc.)

body:0035.text: to support via the chat bubble and we’ll take care of the rest.

body:0036.text: No action is required on your end beyond sharing the correct code.
